title: Custom Terraform Providers
learningObjectives: Understand the Terraform Plugin Framework architecture
Implement a custom provider with resource and data source CRUD
Use provider_meta and configure provider-level shared clients
Publish a custom provider to Terraform Registry

theory.content:
Why Build a Custom Provider?

Custom providers are needed when you want to manage resources via an API that doesn't have an existing provider — internal services, proprietary systems, or custom databases.

Terraform Plugin Framework (v6)

HashiCorp recommends the Terraform Plugin Framework (Go SDK v6) over the older SDKv2 for new providers. It provides better typing, improved diagnostics, and native support for Terraform 1.x features.

// provider.go
package provider

import (
  "github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-framework/provider"
  "github.com/hashicorp/terraform-plugin-framework/resource"
)

type MyProvider struct{}

func (p *MyProvider) Metadata(ctx context.Context,
  req provider.MetadataRequest,
  resp *provider.MetadataResponse) {
  resp.TypeName = "mycompany"
  resp.Version  = "1.0.0"
}

func (p *MyProvider) Schema(ctx context.Context,
  req provider.SchemaRequest,
  resp *provider.SchemaResponse) {
  resp.Schema = schema.Schema{
    Attributes: map[string]schema.Attribute{
      "endpoint": schema.StringAttribute{
        Required: true,
        Description: "API endpoint URL",
      },
      "token": schema.StringAttribute{
        Required:  true,
        Sensitive: true,
      },
    },
  }
}

func (p *MyProvider) Resources(ctx context.Context) []func() resource.Resource {
  return []func() resource.Resource{
    NewProjectResource,
  }
}

Implementing a Resource

// resource_project.go
func (r *ProjectResource) Create(ctx context.Context,
  req resource.CreateRequest,
  resp *resource.CreateResponse) {
  
  var data ProjectResourceModel
  resp.Diagnostics.Append(req.Plan.Get(ctx, &data)...)
  if resp.Diagnostics.HasError() { return }

  // Call your API
  project, err := r.client.CreateProject(data.Name.ValueString())
  if err != nil {
    resp.Diagnostics.AddError("Error creating project", err.Error())
    return
  }
  data.Id = types.StringValue(project.ID)
  resp.Diagnostics.Append(resp.State.Set(ctx, &data)...)
}

Local Provider Development

# .terraformrc (point to local binary)
provider_installation {
  dev_overrides {
    "mycompany/myprovider" = "/home/user/go/bin"
  }
  direct {}
}

Terraform Plugin Framework →
